mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, COALESCE(t.display_name, t.name, t.code) AS tenantName, CASE WHEN u.user_type = 'SYSTEM_OPS' THEN 'SYSTEM_OPS' ELSE 'TENANT_SUPER_ADMIN' END AS adminType, s.platform, s.login_method AS loginMethod, s.login_ip AS loginIp, s.user_agent AS userAgent, s.last_active_at AS lastActiveAt, s.created_at AS createdAt FROM user_sessions s JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id JOIN tenants t ON t.id = u.tenant_id WHERE
ORDER BY s.last_active_at DESC, s.created_at DESC

SELECT s.user_id AS userId, s.tenant_id AS tenantId, u.username FROM user_sessions s JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id JOIN tenants t ON t.id = u.tenant_id WHERE s.id = #{sessionId} AND
LIMIT 1
